items.title: Wayne Rooney May Need Surgery After Saving A Jordan Pickford Shot In Training
items.summary: Manchester United legend Wayne Rooney has revealed he might need an operation after picking up a freak wrist injury.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Parag: 'If we keep playing like this, we shouldn't be in contention for top four'
items.summary: Rajasthan Royals suffered their third successive defeat, and find themselves sixth with two games left
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Neymar furious as he is wrongly substituted
items.summary: Neymar was involved in a furious row with officials after Santos claimed the forward had been wrongly substituted in their 3-0 defeat by Coritiba - a day before Brazil announce...
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
